prompt:
Clean hand-drawn line-art, sharp ink linework, brush-painted flat coloring with hard shadows. SMOOTH painterly source image — NO pixel art, NO 8-bit, NO chunky pixels, NO mosaic dither (dither applied later).

PC-98 title screen, 4:3 WIDE ESTABLISHING SHOT, layered depth.

UPPER HALF: cyberpunk CITYSCAPE — towers, neon, rain.

MIDGROUND: 'EIDOLON CORP' tower, red neon, banners, wordmark LEGIBLE. Plaza far below: 7-9 androids streaming out, varied hairstyles, varied beards, varied faces. Ceremonial: navy coats, gold epaulettes, red sashes, white gloves.

FOREGROUND LEFT: protagonist STANDING on SOLID CONCRETE ROOFTOP — concrete ledge, rebar, gravel. Feet planted flat. GRAVITY-APPLIED. GROUNDED. Not floating, not hovering, not levitating, not on hoverboard or hover-platform. Hooded dark long coat, BACK to viewer, looking DOWN at androids below. Too far for them to spot him.

ONLY text 'GHOST PROCESS' in dripping red horror font bottom-left.

Style: Snatcher late-80s PC-98 mature cyberpunk, no anime no moe. Sharp ink, painterly color, hard shadows. Palette: deep blue, cyan, blood red, gold.

Avoid: cartoon, kawaii, chibi, cute, big dough eyes, 3D render, photorealistic, CGI, smooth gradient shading, super-deformed, stubby limbs, all-white figure, monochrome pale, non-human, feral beast, watermark, signature, frame border, jump scare, pixel art, 8-bit, chunky pixels, mosaic dither, scanlines, floating, hovering, levitating, hoverboard, hover-platform

Clean line-art, sharp ink, brush-painted flat coloring with hard shadows. SMOOTH painterly source image — NO pixel art, NO 8-bit, NO dither (applied later).

PC-98 title screen, 4:3 EXTREME HIGH-ANGLE OVERLOOK from rooftop edge.

PROTAGONIST: standing on EDGE of tall rooftop, BACK to viewer, hood up, dark long coat. ONLY SHINS-UP visible — boots and raw concrete ledge occupy bottom-center, camera gaze DOWN. Re-bar, gravel under feet.

ANGLE: extreme high-angle looking STRAIGHT DOWN. EIDOLON CORP tower and plaza FAR BELOW (1/6 size of boots). Plaza androids are TINY ANT-LIKE FIGURES, far below. Vertical lines emphasising tower height. Diagonal rain streaks.

BOTTOM-LEFT QUARTER: plaza far below — TINY marching ants, TINY drones, fog haze. Camera is 200+ meters above ground.

Protagonist is GRAVITY-ANCHORED, FEET PLANTED ON CONCRETE, NOT FLOATING. Androids CANNOT see him.

ONLY text 'GHOST PROCESS' in dripping red horror font at bottom-center, below boots. Style: Snatcher late-80s PC-98 mature cyberpunk, no anime no moe. Sharp ink, hard shadows. Palette: deep blue, cyan, blood red, gold. Cold horror.

Avoid: cartoon, kawaii, chibi, cute, 3D render, photorealistic, CGI, smooth gradient, super-deformed, ground shadow, watermark, signature, frame border, jump scare, pixel art, 8-bit, mosaic dither, scanlines, floating, hovering, levitating, hoverboard, hover-platform, drone under feet, midair protagonist, androids at eye level, close-up androids

Clean line-art, sharp ink, brush-painted flat coloring with hard shadows. SMOOTH painterly source — NO pixel art, NO 8-bit, NO dither (applied later).

PC-98 title screen, 4:3. STORY: recon overwatcher CASING a tower mid-mission.

PROTAGONIST (CENTER-LEFT FOREGROUND): crouched low on rooftop edge, hood up, dark coat roughed-up. Binoculars to face in one hand, DATAPAD on other wrist marked with pen. City-map printout taped to ledge in front, red-ink markings.

HIS ROOFTOP (distinctive): water tank with faded kanji, rusted antenna mast, tar-paper patching. Black canvas bag on ledge corner. HIS PERCH.

HIS TARGET (FAR BELOW, RIGHT THIRD): EIDOLON CORP tower with SPECIFIC SIDE SERVICE-ENTRANCE (back dock, rolling shutter), two patrolling androids on perimeter — navy coats, gold epaulettes, red sashes, white gloves, varied hairstyles and beards. Hard floodlight shadows. Faint red laser-trace.

ACTION: JUST finished marking pass, LOWERING binoculars, eyes shifting to datapad, furrowed brow — CALCULATING.

Androids 1/8 size of protagonist (200m elevation). Diagonal rain.

ONLY text 'GHOST PROCESS' in dripping red horror font at bottom-right corner.

Style: Snatcher late-80s PC-98 mature cyberpunk, no anime no moe. Sharp ink, hard shadows. Palette: deep blue, cyan, blood red, gold.

PC-98 title screen, 4:3. STORY: teenage runaway hunted through backstreet at night.

PROTAGONIST (CENTER FOREGROUND): mid-sprint, 3/4 FROM BEHIND, leaning into run. YOUNG — late teens to early twenties, lean and hungry, NOT grizzled. Slightly-too-young face glimpsed in profile. Messy unwashed hair. Cheap thrift-store windbreaker two sizes too big, frayed cuffs, caught in wind. Cheap sneakers pounding wet cobblestone, one kicking up splash. Hands pumping.

CHASE: alley, cobblestones slick with rain. Smoke/vapor pouring from a drain as he runs past. Puddles reflecting his silhouette. Walls closing in — TRAP. One hand skims brickwork as he banks a corner.

THREAT (FAR BACKGROUND, soft focus): TWO patrolling androids in ceremonial navy coats and red sashes, half a block back. Red eye-glow. Chasing but framing makes HIM the hero.

Wide fixed-camera side-on interior for a mature 1990s point-and-click cyberpunk horror game. A clandestine computer laboratory for inducing out-of-body experiences: reclining medical induction couch against the back wall, EEG crown, old CRT monitors with abstract waveforms and no readable text, oscilloscopes, signal amplifiers, copper induction coils, sensory-deprivation pod, Faraday mesh, cable bundles and improvised clinical equipment. Wall parallel to the camera, standing eye-level, medium-wide zoom, readable left-to-right room. Keep the lower 42 percent as one continuous unobstructed shallow-depth floor walk plane with clear near and far boundaries; equipment stays mostly against the back wall, with foreground machinery only at extreme edges for occlusion. Important composition fits a centered 4:3 crop. Oppressive cyan and dim red practical light, hard shadows, rain-stained concrete, steel and beige computer plastic. Smooth detailed source illustration for later palette quantization and Bayer dithering, not chunky pixel art. No people, figures, silhouettes, androids, mannequins, statues, protagonist, text, labels, logos, UI, close-up, top-down, isometric, fisheye, cheerful colours or cute anime styling.

Eight-panel horizontal walk-cycle reference sheet for one adult human protagonist in a mature cyberpunk horror point-and-click adventure. Same character repeated in every panel, strict side profile facing right: late-thirties investigator, realistic angular face, short practical black hair, dark graphite field jacket with restrained oxblood collar, narrow black utility trousers, flat worn boots, clinical gloves and a small neural-interface jack behind one ear. Human, not an android, no weapon. Panels show a clear loop: neutral standing rest, right step, passing pose, left step, opposite contact, passing pose, returning step, rest. Full body head to boots in every panel, identical scale, identical feet baseline, no cropping, generous panel spacing. Flat saturated chroma-magenta background everywhere, no gradient, no floor, no cast shadow. Smooth detailed cel-painted source art for later runtime palette quantization and Bayer dithering, not pixel art. No extra characters, no duplicate limbs, no front or three-quarter view, no text, borders, UI, big anime eyes, oversized head, moe or cheerful styling.

Side-elevation room plate for a mature 1990s point-and-click cyberpunk horror game. The camera is exactly parallel to a long back wall, like a theatre set viewed from the side: NO vanishing-point tunnel, NO central perspective corridor, NO first-person view, NO isometric view. Show a wide rectangular computer laboratory from left to right, built to induce out-of-body experiences. Back wall equipment: reclining medical induction couch, EEG crown, old CRT monitors with abstract waveforms and no readable text, oscilloscopes, signal amplifiers, copper induction coils, sensory-deprivation pod and Faraday mesh. Put all major machinery along the back wall. Keep the entire lower 40 percent as a continuous clear horizontal floor strip for a character to walk left/right and slightly toward/away from camera; no object blocks its center. Include a clear near floor edge and a back floor edge so the walk plane has depth. Foreground occluders may touch only the extreme left and right borders. Standing eye-level, fixed medium-wide zoom, important content inside a centered 4:3 safe crop. Oppressive cyan and dim red practical light, hard shadows, stained concrete, steel and beige computer plastic. Smooth detailed source illustration for later palette quantization and Bayer dithering, not chunky pixel art. No people, figures, silhouettes, androids, mannequins, statues, protagonist, text, labels, logos, UI, close-up, fisheye, cheerful colours or cute anime styling.

Isolated full-body side-profile character source for a mature cyberpunk horror point-and-click adventure. An adult investigator in their late thirties with realistic mature proportions, angular face, tired eyes, short practical black hair, dark graphite field jacket with a restrained oxblood-red inner collar, narrow black utility trousers, flat worn boots, fingerless clinical gloves, and a small neural-interface jack behind one ear. Human and visibly distinct from any android or thug; no armour, no weapon, no trench-coat tails, no oversized accessories. Neutral standing rest pose facing screen-right, arms relaxed, feet planted on one exact horizontal baseline. Entire figure visible and uncropped with generous transparent-looking margin on the top and both sides, but the boot soles touch the bottom baseline. Consistent readable silhouette for a small gameplay sprite. Detailed smooth cel-painted source illustration inspired by serious late-1980s and early-1990s Japanese computer adventure character art, intended for later palette quantization and Bayer dithering; do not render chunky pixel art. Place the figure against one perfectly flat saturated chroma-magenta background, RGB 255 0 255, with no gradient, no texture, no cast shadow and no floor. One character only, one pose only, no sprite sheet, no duplicate limbs, no front view, no three-quarter camera, no text, no border, no UI, no big anime eyes, no oversized head, no moe, no kawaii expression, no bright cheerful palette.

prompt: A detailed smooth source illustration of an in-universe late-1980s Japanese PC-98 cyberpunk medical-laboratory computer interface, shown perfectly front-on as a full-screen operating environment with no physical monitor bezel. Oppressive clinical horror mood, deep petrol teal and cold cyan with restrained dark crimson warning accents, hard geometric light, harsh shadows, subtle analog CRT bloom and worn industrial texture. Composition designed for a 4:3 crop inside the landscape image: a narrow blank status bar across the top, an orderly left column of four unlabeled abstract application glyphs, one large EMPTY dark central workspace, a narrow blank footer strip, precise bevelled rectangular frames, inset wells, tiny indicator lamps, fine technical linework. Mature serious Snatcher and Policenauts-era industrial interface design, not cute, not playful. Keep every panel clean and spacious so custom game text can be added later. ABSOLUTELY NO WRITING OR TYPOGRAPHY ANYWHERE: no words, no letters, no numbers, no labels, no logos, no pseudo-text, no gibberish glyph rows, no signatures, no watermark. No people, no faces, no figures, no silhouettes, no hands, no characters. No icons containing letters. No Windows logo, no modern flat UI, no rounded smartphone cards. Smooth detailed source art, not blocky pixel art; runtime will apply PC-98 palette quantization and dithering. Symmetrical, orthographic, readable interface geometry, screen fills the frame.

prompt: A clean orthographic asset board showing reusable interface components for a fictional 1988 Japanese PC-98 cyberpunk horror operating system, arranged in a tidy grid on one flat solid near-black teal background. Include: three separate blank rectangular window frames with empty navy interiors and blank title bars; six blank bevelled rectangular buttons in raised and pressed states; four isolated unlabeled application icons shaped as a dossier, sealed message, floor schematic, and machine diagnostic module; small cyan and dark-red indicator lamps; two empty status strips; one empty inset text well. Every object fully visible, separated by generous clear background gaps, straight-on with no perspective, hard square corners, crisp edges, consistent cold cyan/deep navy/dark crimson palette, serious industrial medical-lab horror styling. ABSOLUTELY NO WRITING OR TYPOGRAPHY: no words, no letters, no numbers, no labels, no logos, no captions, no pseudo-text, no gibberish symbols, no signatures, no watermark. No people, no faces, no figures, no silhouettes, no hands. No modern rounded cards, no cute icons, no bright cheerful colors. Detailed smooth source illustration, not blocky pixel art; intended for cropping, splicing, and later PC-98 palette quantization.

prompt_document.prompt: A clean orthographic asset board showing reusable interface components for a fictional 1988 Japanese PC-98 cyberpunk horror operating system, arranged in a tidy grid on one flat solid near-black teal background. Include: three separate blank rectangular window frames with empty navy interiors and blank title bars; six blank bevelled rectangular buttons in raised and pressed states; four isolated unlabeled application icons shaped as a dossier, sealed message, floor schematic, and machine diagnostic module; small cyan and dark-red indicator lamps; two empty status strips; one empty inset text well. Every object fully visible, separated by generous clear background gaps, straight-on with no perspective, hard square corners, crisp edges, consistent cold cyan/deep navy/dark crimson palette, serious industrial medical-lab horror styling. ABSOLUTELY NO WRITING OR TYPOGRAPHY: no words, no letters, no numbers, no labels, no logos, no captions, no pseudo-text, no gibberish symbols, no signatures, no watermark. No people, no faces, no figures, no silhouettes, no hands. No modern rounded cards, no cute icons, no bright cheerful colors. Detailed smooth source illustration, not blocky pixel art; intended for cropping, splicing, and later PC-98 palette quantization.
